_instructions: Update these numbers every Monday morning before 9 AM. Pull from Amazon Seller Central → Business Reports (sessions, CVR) and Campaign Manager (spend, ACoS). Takes about 2 minutes.

fountain._notes: Pull from Business Reports > Detail Page Sales and Traffic > Unit Session Percentage = CVR

filters._notes: Filters run zero ad spend. Pull units from Business Reports only.

bundle._notes: Track separately to understand bundle attach rate

weekly_summary._notes: Optional: add any observations you want the Experiment Strategist to factor in

active_experiments.hypothesis: Adding '[X]-day battery' to title will improve CVR by increasing buyer confidence
Adding '4.5★ rated' to A+ headline will improve scroll-to-cart conversion

active_experiments.element: Secondary image — '20 dB Quietest in Class' overlay
active_experiments.hypothesis: 20 dB claim as image overlay will increase CTR and CVR vs. generic 'quiet' claims
Naming 3 smart flow modes in Bullet 2 reduces buyer uncertainty
Adding 'for Cats & Small Dogs' to title will index for dog keywords and increase sessions
